req.title: System-Admin views org-announcement
req.statement: An authenticated system-admin shall be able to view a org-announcement through the UI form. Mandatory fields must be validated and an audit record must be written on success.

doc.reasoning: R-WEB-052 requires a system-admin to view an org-announcement via UI with audit trail. I derived: (1) a positive EP test confirming a valid admin can view an existing announcement and an audit record is written; (2) a NEG test confirming a non-admin (forbidden role) receives a 403 or is redirected away; (3) a BVA test exercising the announcement list boundary (exactly 1 record present); (4) a NEG test for unauthenticated access returning 401/redirect; (5) a STC test verifying the state transition from 'announcement exists' to 'viewed' leaves an audit entry. All tests use pytest + Playwright fixtures and REST API helpers as placeholders.

tests.name: test_admin_views_org_announcement_success
preconditions: At least one org-announcement exists in the system
actions: Select the first announcement in the list
expected: Announcement title and body are visible
Audit record is written for the view action
trace: R-WEB-052: audit record written on success
tests.executable:
def test_admin_views_org_announcement_success(admin_page, seed_announcement, audit_log_client):
    announcement = seed_announcement()
    page = admin_page
    page.goto("/org-announcements")
    assert page.url.endswith("/org-announcements")
    row = page.locator(f"[data-testid='announcement-{announcement['id']}']").first
    row.click()
    page.wait_for_selector("[data-testid='announcement-detail']", timeout=5000)
    title = page.locator("[data-testid='announcement-title']").inner_text()
    assert title == announcement["title"]
    detail = page.locator("[data-testid='announcement-detail']").inner_text()
    assert announcement["body"] in detail
    audit = audit_log_client.get_latest(entity="org_announcement", entity_id=announcement["id"])
    assert audit["action"] == "view"
    assert audit["actor_role"] == "admin"
    assert page.locator("[data-testid='error-banner']").count() == 0

tests.name: test_non_admin_role_forbidden_from_org_announcements
actions: Attempt to navigate to /org-announcements as a viewer-role user
expected: Access is denied: page shows 403 error or redirect to /forbidden
No audit view record is written for this attempt
trace: R-WEB-052: error pathway 403 if role forbidden
tests.executable:
def test_non_admin_role_forbidden_from_org_announcements(viewer_page, seed_announcement, audit_log_client):
    announcement = seed_announcement()
    page = viewer_page
    page.goto("/org-announcements")
    forbidden = (
        page.url.endswith("/forbidden")
        or page.locator("[data-testid='error-403']").count() > 0
        or page.locator("text=403").count() > 0
    )
    assert forbidden, f"Expected 403/forbidden page, got: {page.url}"
    assert page.locator("[data-testid='announcement-detail']").count() == 0
    audit = audit_log_client.find(
        entity="org_announcement",
        entity_id=announcement["id"],
        action="view"
    )
    assert audit is None, "No audit view record should exist for forbidden access"

tests.name: test_admin_views_single_boundary_announcement
preconditions: Exactly ONE org-announcement exists (lower boundary of list)
actions: Verify exactly one item is shown
expected: Viewing the single announcement returns HTTP 200 content
trace: R-WEB-052: boundary — minimum list size of 1 announcement
R-WEB-052: audit record written on success
tests.executable:
def test_admin_views_single_boundary_announcement(admin_page, seed_exact_announcements, audit_log_client):
    announcement = seed_exact_announcements(count=1)[0]
    page = admin_page
    page.goto("/org-announcements")
    items = page.locator("[data-testid='announcement-row']").all()
    assert len(items) == 1, f"Expected 1 announcement, found {len(items)}"
    items[0].click()
    page.wait_for_selector("[data-testid='announcement-detail']", timeout=5000)
    assert page.locator("[data-testid='announcement-title']").inner_text() == announcement["title"]
    next_btn = page.locator("[data-testid='pagination-next']")
    if next_btn.count() > 0:
        assert not next_btn.is_enabled(), "Pagination next should be disabled for single item"
    audit = audit_log_client.get_latest(entity="org_announcement", entity_id=announcement["id"])
    assert audit["action"] == "view"

tests.name: test_unauthenticated_user_cannot_view_org_announcements
preconditions: User is NOT authenticated (no session / token)
actions: Attempt to navigate to /org-announcements without logging in
expected: User is redirected to /login or receives 401
tests.executable:
def test_unauthenticated_user_cannot_view_org_announcements(browser_context_factory, audit_log_client):
    context = browser_context_factory()  # no auth cookies/tokens
    page = context.new_page()
    page.goto("/org-announcements")
    page.wait_for_load_state("networkidle", timeout=5000)
    redirected_to_login = "/login" in page.url
    has_401 = page.locator("[data-testid='error-401']").count() > 0
    assert redirected_to_login or has_401, (
        f"Expected redirect to /login or 401, but URL is: {page.url}"
    )
    assert page.locator("[data-testid='announcement-row']").count() == 0
    context.close()

tests.name: test_admin_view_transitions_announcement_state_to_viewed
preconditions: An org-announcement exists with status 'unread' for this admin
actions: Confirm audit record transition is logged
expected: Audit record captures transition: unread -> read
Response is 200 with entity id present
trace: R-WEB-052: state transition — unread announcement moves to read after view
R-WEB-052: audit record written on success
tests.executable:
def test_admin_view_transitions_announcement_state_to_viewed(admin_page, seed_unread_announcement, audit_log_client, api_client):
    announcement = seed_unread_announcement()
    assert announcement["status"] == "unread"
    page = admin_page
    page.goto("/org-announcements")
    row = page.locator(f"[data-testid='announcement-{announcement['id']}']").first
    assert "unread" in (row.get_attribute("class") or "")
    row.click()
    page.wait_for_selector("[data-testid='announcement-detail']", timeout=5000)
    updated = api_client.get(f"/org-announcements/{announcement['id']}")
    assert updated.status_code == 200
    assert updated.json()["status"] == "read"
    audit = audit_log_client.get_latest(entity="org_announcement", entity_id=announcement["id"])
    assert audit["action"] == "view"
    assert audit["previous_state"] == "unread"
    assert audit["new_state"] == "read"
